summary: Iteration 190 testing complete: Live GPS Tracking for Power Spots feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: PowerSpotAdmin page at /admin/power-spot with Track/Stop buttons, GPS badges, and tracking-active indicators with pulsing animation.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot_id}/update-location properly rejects pings when tracking disabled (400)
GET /api/cosmic-map/power-spots?include_all=true returns all spots including inactive ones
GET /api/cosmic-map/power-spots (no param) correctly filters to only active spots
Power spot response includes live_tracking and last_location_update fields
Frontend Track/Stop button has data-testid='track-{spot_id}' for testing
GPS badge appears when live_tracking is true
tracking-active indicator with data-testid='tracking-active-{spot_id}' shows pulsing animation when GPS tracking ON
Geolocation watchPosition used for real-time GPS updates every 10 seconds
seed_data_creation: Test spots created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 190 Live GPS Tracking feature fully working. PowerSpotAdmin at /admin/power-spot shows Track/Stop buttons for each spot. Clicking Track enables live_tracking and shows GPS badge + tracking-active indicator with pulsing animation. Clicking Stop disables tracking. Backend rejects update-location calls when tracking is disabled (400 error). Note: Geolocation is not available in headless browser so actual GPS pings cannot be tested, but the toggle and API behavior is verified.

backend_apis.POST /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot_i: Toggles live_tracking field (enabled=true/false), returns success, spot_id, live_tracking, message
backend_apis.PUT /api/cosmic-map/power-spots/{spot_id: Updates lat/lng when tracking enabled, returns 400 when tracking disabled, returns 404 for nonexistent spot
backend_apis.GET /api/cosmic-map/power-spots?include_: Returns all spots including inactive ones
